name: Alpha Omega Builders
tagline: Sonoma County home building & remodeling since 1992
seoDescription: Alpha Omega Builders is a Santa Rosa general contractor (CSLB #647675) building custom homes, additions, decks and remodels across Sonoma County since 1992.

sections.heading: Custom homes and remodels, built right in Santa Rosa
sections.subheading: A family-owned Sonoma County general contractor handling everything from new home construction to additions, decks, and full remodels.

items.title: Custom Home Construction
items.description: Ground-up new home building, drawing on more than 30 years of Sonoma County construction experience.

sections.heading: About Alpha Omega Builders
body: Alpha Omega Builders has been a fixture of Sonoma County construction since 1992, when owner Ron Smith first put his California General Building license (CSLB #647675) to work. More than three decades later, the Santa Rosa company is still family owned and operated, handling virtually every facet of home construction.

From ground-up custom homes to additions, decks, garages, barns, shops, and full remodels, Ron and his crew are known for showing up on time, cleaning up at the end of every day, and finishing the job when they said they would. Fully licensed and insured, they offer free estimates throughout the Santa Rosa area.

items.quote: Ron and his crew were on time, cleaned up every day, actually used some of my Mother's ideas and finished on time.
items.author: HomeAdvisor review

items.quote: Ron is awesome. He has a great personality and does great work.
items.author: Verified homeowner

items.quote: Ron and his crew are amazing. I have never had a construction job that actually finished on time!!
items.author: Verified homeowner
